difference_records.left_value: Begin with an unresolved system fault. List candidate causes, gather diagnostic signals, and test the candidate causes against those signals. If the cause remains unresolved, repeat the diagnostic process. End when a cause is accepted or when further diagnosis is not justified.
difference_records.right_value: The packet describes a diagnostic procedure that begins from an unresolved system fault. Candidate causes are enumerated and diagnostic signals are collected, and the candidates are then tested against those signals. If the cause is still not resolved, the procedure repeats; the point it repeats back to is not specified. The procedure terminates under either of two conditions: a cause is accepted, or continuing diagnosis is deemed unjustified. Acceptance criteria, justification criteria, the mutability of the candidate list, and the loop boundary are all left unspecified by the packet.
difference_records.explanation: Summaries differ in compression or prose detail.

difference_records.left_value: Extraction is confined to explicit packet content and reasonable procedural implications. Unspecified control details are recorded as ambiguities rather than inferred.
difference_records.right_value: The packet is extremely sparse: six declarative sentences, each contributing at most one procedural element. Consequently the ratio of inferred-to-explicit content in the constraint layer is high and is flagged throughout. Three points deserve emphasis. (1) The single largest underdetermination is the loop back-edge target; three readings are equally supported and none was selected. (2) The packet describes a procedure that ends at cause acceptance — it contains no repair, remediation, or verification step. This absence is recorded rather than filled, even though the recognized shape would ordinarily continue past acceptance. (3) The 'further diagnosis is not justified' exit is the only element that appeals to a criterion wholly outside the candidate/signal machinery, and the packet supplies no content for it; it has been preserved as an explicit but empty termination condition rather than being reconstructed as a candidate-exhaustion rule. No evaluation of the underlying theory, framework, or procedure was performed, and no redesign, critique, or extension is offered. Passive-voice phrasing throughout the packet ('are listed', 'are gathered', 'are tested') leaves every agent unspecified; no agent was inferred.

difference_records.left_value: The packet is extremely sparse: six declarative sentences, each contributing at most one procedural element. Consequently the ratio of inferred-to-explicit content in the constraint layer is high and is flagged throughout. Three points deserve emphasis. (1) The single largest underdetermination is the loop back-edge target; three readings are equally supported and none was selected. (2) The packet describes a procedure that ends at cause acceptance — it contains no repair, remediation, or verification step. This absence is recorded rather than filled, even though the recognized shape would ordinarily continue past acceptance. (3) The 'further diagnosis is not justified' exit is the only element that appeals to a criterion wholly outside the candidate/signal machinery, and the packet supplies no content for it; it has been preserved as an explicit but empty termination condition rather than being reconstructed as a candidate-exhaustion rule. No evaluation of the underlying theory, framework, or procedure was performed, and no redesign, critique, or extension is offered. Passive-voice phrasing throughout the packet ('are listed', 'are gathered', 'are tested') leaves every agent unspecified; no agent was inferred.

difference_records.left_value: The packet describes a diagnostic procedure that begins from an unresolved system fault. Candidate causes are enumerated and diagnostic signals are collected, and the candidates are then tested against those signals. If the cause is still not resolved, the procedure repeats; the point it repeats back to is not specified. The procedure terminates under either of two conditions: a cause is accepted, or continuing diagnosis is deemed unjustified. Acceptance criteria, justification criteria, the mutability of the candidate list, and the loop boundary are all left unspecified by the packet.
difference_records.right_value: Starting from an uncertain delivery path, the procedure produces a set of candidate routes, gathers information chosen for its power to distinguish those candidates from one another, and then assesses the candidates. If confidence in a route remains insufficient, the procedure repeats; the packet does not say which step it repeats from. The procedure halts on either of two conditions: a route is accepted, or continued searching is judged unwarranted. The packet gives no thresholds, no metrics, no acceptance procedure, and no account of how confidence is computed or updated.
difference_records.explanation: Summaries differ in compression or prose detail.

difference_records.left_value: The packet is extremely sparse: six declarative sentences, each contributing at most one procedural element. Consequently the ratio of inferred-to-explicit content in the constraint layer is high and is flagged throughout. Three points deserve emphasis. (1) The single largest underdetermination is the loop back-edge target; three readings are equally supported and none was selected. (2) The packet describes a procedure that ends at cause acceptance — it contains no repair, remediation, or verification step. This absence is recorded rather than filled, even though the recognized shape would ordinarily continue past acceptance. (3) The 'further diagnosis is not justified' exit is the only element that appeals to a criterion wholly outside the candidate/signal machinery, and the packet supplies no content for it; it has been preserved as an explicit but empty termination condition rather than being reconstructed as a candidate-exhaustion rule. No evaluation of the underlying theory, framework, or procedure was performed, and no redesign, critique, or extension is offered. Passive-voice phrasing throughout the packet ('are listed', 'are gathered', 'are tested') leaves every agent unspecified; no agent was inferred.
difference_records.right_value: The packet is six declarative statements. Every extracted element traces to one of them; nothing has been added to produce a complete or well-formed procedure. Three structural gaps are load-bearing and were left open rather than closed: (1) the loop's return point, (2) whether 'sufficient confidence' and 'accepted' are the same condition, (3) where the 'further search not justified' test is evaluated. Any of the three could be settled by a single additional sentence in the source, and settling them differently yields materially different procedures — so no default was chosen. The packet is written in a passive, agentless register throughout ('are generated', 'is gathered', 'are assessed'); no agent, no cost model, no evidence model, and no downstream execution of the accepted route appear anywhere in it, and none have been supplied here.
difference_records.explanation: Notes differ in explanatory detail or style.

difference_records.left_value: Starting from an uncertain delivery path, the procedure produces a set of candidate routes, gathers information chosen for its power to distinguish those candidates from one another, and then assesses the candidates. If confidence in a route remains insufficient, the procedure repeats; the packet does not say which step it repeats from. The procedure halts on either of two conditions: a route is accepted, or continued searching is judged unwarranted. The packet gives no thresholds, no metrics, no acceptance procedure, and no account of how confidence is computed or updated.
difference_records.right_value: The procedure begins from a state in which a policy position is uncertain. Candidate interpretations are produced, review inputs judged relevant are collected, and the interpretations are assessed. If acceptability is still insufficient, the procedure repeats from an earlier point (the packet does not say which). The procedure halts under either of two conditions: an interpretation is accepted, or continuing the review is judged not to be justified. Beyond this, the packet supplies no agents, thresholds, criteria of relevance, iteration bounds, or post-termination effects.
difference_records.explanation: Summaries differ in compression or prose detail.

difference_records.left_value: The packet is six declarative statements. Every extracted element traces to one of them; nothing has been added to produce a complete or well-formed procedure. Three structural gaps are load-bearing and were left open rather than closed: (1) the loop's return point, (2) whether 'sufficient confidence' and 'accepted' are the same condition, (3) where the 'further search not justified' test is evaluated. Any of the three could be settled by a single additional sentence in the source, and settling them differently yields materially different procedures — so no default was chosen. The packet is written in a passive, agentless register throughout ('are generated', 'is gathered', 'are assessed'); no agent, no cost model, no evidence model, and no downstream execution of the accepted route appear anywhere in it, and none have been supplied here.
difference_records.right_value: The packet is six declarative sentences in the passive voice, with no agents, no thresholds, no cardinalities, and no iteration bounds. Consequently the recoverable procedure is a skeleton: a linear three-step body under a repeat-until loop with a two-reason exit. Four decisions were deliberately left open rather than resolved for cleanliness: (1) the loop-back target, (2) whether acceptance is identical to sufficient acceptability, (3) the branch arity at the decision point, (4) whether the opening sentence is a step or a precondition. Nothing in the structural, primitive, or constraint layers introduces policy-domain machinery beyond the packet's own wording ('policy position', 'interpretations', 'review inputs', 'acceptability', 'review not justified').
difference_records.explanation: Notes differ in explanatory detail or style.
